content:
## Tiered Knowledge Dashboard Implementation (Issue #25)

Implemented 4 dashboard visualization components for the tiered knowledge lifecycle:

### API Endpoints Added
- `GET /api/dashboard/tiers` — tier distribution (hot/warm/cold/forgotten counts) + forgetting enabled flag
- `GET /api/dashboard/tiers/transitions` — recent tier transitions parsed from structured trace logs (tier_transition events)
- `GET /api/dashboard/tiers/pinned` — pinned entries list via knowledge JSON scan
- `GET /api/dashboard/tiers/gc-history` — knowledge GC cycle reports from GcKnowledgeHistory ring buffer
- `POST /api/dashboard/tiers/unpin/{entry_id}` — unpin entry (with frontend confirmation gate)

### Key Design Decisions
- Tier distribution uses direct LiteStore downcast (`count_tiers_by_scope`) rather than full `system_status` call for performance
- Tier transitions are parsed from `corvia-traces.log` structured events (message="tier_transition"), read from end for recency
- File I/O for transition parsing wrapped in `spawn_blocking` to prevent async runtime starvation
- Content preview truncation uses `char_indices()` for UTF-8 safety (not byte slicing)
- Frontend uses `window.confirm()` before unpin to match MCP confirmation pattern
- New "Tiers" tab added to dashboard Layout, with 2-column responsive grid

### Frontend Components (Preact/TSX)
- TierDistributionChart: stacked bar with legend, ARIA labels
- RecentTransitions: table with tier badges, cross-tab deeplinks via navigateToHistory
- PinnedEntries: list with unpin button (confirmation + disabled state during request)
- GcHistoryTimeline: SVG sparkline + latest cycle stats with transition breakdown

### Review Findings Addressed
- UTF-8 panic on multi-byte content (Critical)
- Async runtime blocking from sync file read (Important)
- Missing unpin confirmation and loading state (Important)
- Silent error swallowing from usePoll (Important)
- Missing cross-tab entry deeplinks (Important)
- Empty state guidance text (Important)
- ARIA accessibility labels (Important)
